context: Tests whether Focus Engine guidance separates visionOS connected-device focus from gaze hover and RealityKit input targets, while routing accessibility-specific focus to the correct sibling skill.

checklist.name: Hover is not focus
checklist.description: States that visionOS gaze hover is not the focus system and that connected devices such as keyboards or game controllers use focus navigation.

checklist.name: Input target requirements
checklist.description: Frames InputTargetComponent plus CollisionComponent as enabling RealityKit entities to receive system input.

checklist.name: Hover effect role
checklist.description: Frames HoverEffectComponent as hover feedback for gaze, direct touch, or pointer hover, not focus.

checklist.name: No gaze-driven FocusState
checklist.description: Does not claim that gaze should programmatically move SwiftUI @FocusState between controls.

checklist.name: Accessibility sibling boundary
checklist.description: Routes VoiceOver, Switch Control, or accessibility-specific focus details to the ios-accessibility skill.
